title: 東京大賞典の後に・あらがえぬ大渦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff. The race to end the year... I gave it everything I had, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What's with all this energy?! The crowd's more
excited than I've ever seen it. Is Oi's Tokyo
Daishoten always like this?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But wait—where's Tarumae?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I wonder... how successful I was.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Was I good enough? Did they see me for who I
am?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they all have their own favorite racers.
But if I can become the dirt race champion...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I can bring all of these cheers to
Tomakomai. I'm sure that'd put a smile on the
faces of everyone back home.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Acute!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Amazing, right? This is what
it's like to run in the end-of-year dirt G1!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's incredible. It's almost too much to take
in.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Each and every racer runs with so much passion,
but even combined, it pales against the sheer
energy of the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It's pretty tough to make yourself the centerpiece
in a place like this.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It didn't feel like any of us were in
control.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It was like both Tarumae and I were swept along
for the ride by the energy in the air. But even
still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I want it to be bigger! And I want to
take it on one more time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
According to my palm reading, my fate will turn in
a drastic new direction next year! Next time, I'm
gonna stand at the center of the storm and blow
everyone away!
